places.name: The Qingping Market
places.description: A fantastic assortment of China's finest and most disturbing wares.

places.name: Whitewater Village Scenic Area
places.description: Man-made waterfall is the tallest in Mainland China.

places.name: Guangzhou Circle
places.description: The world's tallest circular building is loaded with symbolism, but many just see a big donut.

places.name: Huanghuagang Mausoleum of the 72 Martyrs
places.description: A replica of the Statue of Liberty watches over the tomb of 72 Chinese revolutionaries.

places.name: Tomb of Sa'ad Ibn Abi Waqqas
places.description: A shrine to the missionary who first brought Islam to China.

places.name: Ceramic Pillows at the Museum of the Nanyue King's Mausoleum
places.description: Three floors above a 2,000-year-old royal tomb is a rare collection of ancient porcelain pillows.
